text: Dr . Severance is great . He introduces you to coding in a way that is non - intimidating and feels completely natural within a couple of weeks . Instead of dreading class I found myself excited about attending everyday and was able to progress faster than the course outline due to his extremely clear and supportive teaching method . I ' m already reading data from files and it isn ' t even covered until the next course . If you take this class , read the book and you will do well .
